query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderType, o.outletId, o.paymentStatus, o.paymentMethod, o.tableNumber, k.id as kot_id, k.outletId as kot_outlet_id, k.isPrinted FROM orders o LEFT JOIN kot_queue k ON o.orderNumber = k.orderNumber WHERE o.orderNumber = '00134';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderType, o.outletId, o.paymentStatus, o.paymentMethod, o.tableNumber, k.id as kot_id, k.outletId as kot_outlet_id, k.isPrinted FROM orders o LEFT JOIN kot_queue k ON o.orderNumber = k.orderNumber WHERE o.orderNumber = '00134';
